## T’au Empire Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Demiurg Pioneer (Cost: 6 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Demiurg Pioneer | 8”/Flying | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 90 x 52mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Demiurg Pioneer is equipped with heavy armour plating, a Magna Rail Rifle, two Blades, and a Combat Helmet.

* **Magna Rail Rifle.** 18”, \+2 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Blade.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Demiurg Pioneer’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Weapon Mount.** The Hernkyn Pioneer can ignore the HEAVY property of one ranged weapon it wields.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SKIRMISHER, VEHICLE, TOUGH, T’AU

#### 0-1 Gue’vesa Weapon Team (Cost: 3 Glory \+1 with Mortar)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gue’vesa Weapon Team | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gue’vesa Weapon Team is equipped with a Missile Launcher, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Missile Launcher.** 36”, IGNORE COVER, HEAVY  
  * Frag: BLAST 3”, SHRAPNEL  
  * Krak: ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Weapon Team.** The Gue’vesa Weapon Team can ignore the HEAVY property of one ranged weapon.

**Upgrades**

* **Mortar Team.** At a cost of 1 additional Glory, the Gue’vesa Weapon Team can be equipped with a Mortar instead of its Missile Launcher.  
  * **Mortar.** 36”, IGNORE COVER, RELOAD, BLAST 3”, HEAVY, SHRAPNEL, SCATTER. Roll injuries for models that would benefit from Cover from the perspective of the BLAST point with \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, T’AU

#### 0-1 Kroot Bounty Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory)

Can be taken by T’au Empire or Outlaw Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kroot Bounty Hunter | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kroot Bounty Hunter is equipped with a Bladestave, a Tanglebomb Launcher, and Tri-Blades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bladestave.** Melee, CRITICAL, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED. Enemy models cannot Retreat from close combat with this model.  
* **Tanglebomb Launcher.** 24”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \+2 INJURY DICE, STUN MARKERS, NONLETHAL, BLAST 2”, STUN  
* **Tri-Blades.** 12”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ASSAULT

**Abilities**

* **Collect Bounty.** At the start of the battle, select one enemy model. The Kroot Bounty Hunter has \+1 DICE to Hit that model with all attacks.  
* **Long Stride.** The Kroot Bounty Hunter has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
INFILTRATOR, KROOT, SKIRMISHER, STEALTH, T’AU

#### 0-2 Kroot Hound (Cost: 2 Glory)

Only a T’au Empire Warband (no Variant or Auxiliary Cadre) can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kroot Hound | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kroot Hound is equipped with its Ripping Fangs. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Ripping Fangs.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Kroot Pet.** Select one other non-BEAST KROOT model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Kroot Hound forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Loping Pounce.** The Kroot Hound has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, and when it Charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, KROOT, NO PROMOTION, STEALTH, T’AU

#### 0-1 Krootox Rampager (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only a T’au Empire Warband (no Variant or Auxiliary Cadre) can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Krootox Rampager | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-1 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Krootox Rampager is equipped with its thick hide, Hunting Javelins, two Krootox Fists, and a Blade. It can make an attack with each of its fists as well as its javelins, treating only the second fist attack as off-hand. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hunting Javelins.** 18”, ASSAULT, PISTOL, THROWN, \+1 INJURY DICE in melee during an Activation in which the wielder Charged  
* **Krootox Fists.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER

**Abilities**

* **Linebreaker.** When this model successfully charges an enemy, that enemy suffers a BLOOD MARKER.  
* **Long Stride.** The Krootox Rampager has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
KROOT, MOUNTED, NO PROMOTION, T’AU, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Krootox Thunderer (Cost: 6 Glory)

Only a T’au Empire Warband (no Variant or Auxiliary Cadre) can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Krootox Thunderer | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-1 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Krootox Thunderer is equipped with its thick hide, a Repeater Cannon, two Krootox Fists, and a Blade. It can make an attack with each of its fists as well as its blade, treating only the second fist attack as off-hand. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Repeater Cannon.** 36”, AUTOMATIC 2, ASSAULT, HEAVY  
* **Krootox Fists.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Long Stride.** The Krootox Thunderer has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Weapon Mount.** The Krootox Thunderer ignores the HEAVY Keyword of its Repeater Cannon.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, KROOT, MOUNTED, NO PROMOTION, T’AU, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Vespid Stingwing (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Vespid Stingwing | 8”/Flying | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Vespid Stingwing is equipped with hard carapace, included in its statistics above, as well as a Neutron Blaster and its Stingwing Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Neutron Blaster.** 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 if wielder moved at least 5” during this Activation, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Stingwing Claws.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Airborne Agility.** The Vespid Stingwing has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, INFILTRATOR, VESPID, SKIRMISHER, T’AU
